parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor User
participant "<<analysis>>\nEditVariablesUI" as EditVariablesUI
participant "<<analysis>>\nUIController" as UIController
participant "<<analysis>>\nw: Workbook" as Workbook
participant "<<analysis>>\nlist: List<Variable>" as List
participant "<<analysis>>\nVariable" as Variable

User -> EditVariablesUI : Edit variables
EditVariablesUI -> UIController : w = getActiveWorkbook()
EditVariablesUI -> Workbook : list = getVariables()

loop
    List -> EditVariablesUI : addItem(Variable)
end

User -> EditVariablesUI : Selects a variable and\nchanges the value
EditVariablesUI -> Variable : setValue(newValue)

@enduml
```
